title: Zandor Rocker
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Rock}} {{Species |image=[[File:Rocker1.png]] |name=Zandor Rocker |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]][[Ewoks (1985) 1|''Ewoks'' (1985) 1]] |class= |subspecies= |races= |height=Under 1 [[Meter/Legends|meter]] |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=[[Color/Legends|Gray]] |haircolor=White |feathers= |eyecolor=Gray |distinctions=Rocklike appearance, burrowing ability |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|I think I'm seeing things!|Wicket W. Warrick|}} The '''Zandor Rockers''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings who looked like rocks with [[Limb/Legends|legs]] and faces. By hiding on the ground, legs retracted, [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] closed, they could pass for mundane stones. The Rockers could run quickly on their legs or burrow rapidly through the ground. Zandor Rockers lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] in the [[Zandor|land for which they were named]]. At one point, an [[Ogre]] named [[Gantu]] began raiding their territory for [[sunnydew flower]]s. Without the [[Plant/Legends|plants]]' [[Glowing nectar|nectar]] to sustain them, Zandor's flora [[Death/Legends|died]] out and left the region barren. When two [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] ventured into Zandor in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] searching for the Ogre, the Rockers aided them in finding and fighting the raider. Their efforts helped chase off Gantu and restore the land to fertility. ==Biology and appearance== {{Quote|We can tunnel right under the gorge for you!|A Zandor Rocker|}} [[File:Rocker_burrowing.png|thumb|left|270px|Zandor Rockers could create tunnels in the earth.]] Zandor Rockers were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of small [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings who looked like stones. Although their shape varied from one individual to the next, most had a wide, flat base that rounded out to a dome-like top. They stood less than a [[Meter/Legends|meter]] tall. Two short, thin [[Limb/Legends|legs]] with narrow feet jutted out from under the body's base and permitted the Rocker to run as quickly as an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]]. Rockers could also spin their bodies so rapidly that their momentum carried them into the ground like a drill and created a tunnel large enough for an Ewok to crawl through, but much too narrow for an [[Ogre]] to follow. However, that left them dizzy and disoriented. A Rocker's body and head formed one unit, although members of the species referred to this portion of their anatomy as a "head." The face—two small [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], a wide brow, and a gaping [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]]—was plastic enough to express a wide range of emotions. They could speak even with their mouths closed. The entire body was [[Color/Legends|gray]], down to the eyes and inside of the mouth. Some Rockers had a white coating atop the head that resembled [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. Rockers felt pain like other sentient beings. They could use their entire body as a weapon against larger creatures, even Ogres. Simply jumping on their enemy with their full weight could be quite painful to the target. ==Society and culture== {{Quote|We don't throw stones around here! Somebody might get hurt!''"
"''Huh?''"
"''And would you mind getting off my head?|The Ewoks meet the Zandor Rockers|}} Several Rockers lived in the [[Zandor]] region of the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. There, they huddled in groups and lay about on the ground with their eyes and mouths closed and legs held underneath the body, camouflaged as mundane stones. Despite their mineral appearance, the Zandor Rockers took offense to being treated like ordinary stones; throwing them or sitting on them were particularly objectionable. They also refrained from throwing pebbles, as the confusion between Rockers and rocks could prove dangerous. Despite these hang-ups, the Zandor Rockers were friendly to outsiders, and even spoke [[Ewokese/Legends|Ewokese]]. They assumed strangers were amicable unless they proved themselves a threat. They held a grudge against the Ogre [[Gantu]], for example, for his role in the despoliation of their territory. ==History== {{Quote|Thanks to you, our land will be as beautiful as it ever was! Come visit us again!|A Zandor Rocker|}} The Zandor Rockers established their home in the Zandor region of the [[Forest/Legends|Forest]] [[Moon/Legends|Moon]] of Endor. There, they lived in harmony with the region's [[sunnydew flower]]s, [[Plant/Legends|plants]] that created [[glowing nectar]] and sustained the growth of the rest of Zandor's plant life. However, an Ogre named Gantu discovered the nectar. He began raiding Rocker territory for the flowers, eventually removing all but one blossom from the area and using the nectar to light his cave. Without the nectar to sustain them, Zandor's plants died, and the land became a desert. [[File:Rocker_attack.png|thumb|right|270px|A Zandor Rocker led the Ewoks to Gantu's lair and played a role in the fight against him.]] In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],{{InsiderCite|23|Star Wars Publications Timeline|''Star Wars'' Publications Timeline}} dates the events of the [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|''Ewoks'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series, which include the appearance of Zandor Rockers in [[Ewoks (1985) 1|''Ewoks'' 1]], to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of {{Film|IV}}, which equates to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. a pair of Ewoks, [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] and [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket W. Warrick]], entered Zandor Rocker territory and took a rest among a camouflaged group of the beings. After some initial faux pas and ruffled feathers, both parties realized that they were mutual enemies of the Ogre Gantu, who had raided the Ewoks' village in the past. The Ewoks asked to be taken to Gantu's cave, and a Rocker led the way. Shortly after they arrived, Gantu returned, and a fight broke out over the nectar and the [[bridge crystal]], an item that, when held to the sun, created the [[Rainbow Bridge]] by which the Ewoks and Gantu could travel to one another's territory. In the commotion, Gantu spilled the nectar on himself, causing his body to glow. He ran off in joy, and new sunnydew flowers sprouted from some nectar that had spilled to the ground. The Rockers urged the Ewoks to return home before the Ogre returned. The bridge crystal had been destroyed in the confrontation with the Ogre, making the Rainbow Bridge impossible, so the Rockers burrowed under the gorge to create a tunnel through which the Ewoks could pass instead. Vowing to visit again, the Ewoks departed. With the return of the sunnydew flowers, Zandor returned to its previous fecundity. ==Behind the scenes== The Zandor Rockers were created by writer [[David Manak]] and artist [[Warren Kremer]] for [[Ewoks (1985) 1|''Ewoks'' 1]], a [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] published by [[Marvel Comics]] on [[January 29]], [[1985]].{{BookCite|title=[[Marvel Age]]|number=Vol. 1 No. 25|publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] Group|date=[[April]] [[1985]]}} ==Appearances== *[[Ewoks (1985) 1|''Ewoks'' (1985) 1]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Zandor Rockers}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Zandor Rocker |es=Zandor Rocker }} [[Category:Mineral-based sentient species]] [[Category:Sentient species of Endor]]
